# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-build-pod
  labels:
    app: ci-cd-builder
spec:
  serviceAccountName: docker-builder-sa
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
  - name: docker-builder
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
      runAsNonRoot: true
      runAsUser: 1000
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "512Mi"
        cpu: "500m"
      limits:
        memory: "2Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_HOST
      value: "tcp://localhost:2376"
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY
      value: "1"
    - name: DOCKER_CERT_PATH
      value: "/certs/client"
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-certs
      mountPath: /certs
      readOnly: true
    - name: workspace
      mountPath: /workspace
  - name: docker-daemon
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      privileged: false
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
      runAsNonRoot: true
      runAsUser: 1000
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
      value: "/certs"
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-certs
      mountPath: /certs
    - name: docker-storage
      mountPath: /var/lib/docker
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "1Gi"
        cpu: "1000m"
      limits:
        memory: "4Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
  volumes:
  - name: docker-certs
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: docker-storage
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: workspace
    emptyDir: {}
  restartPolicy: Never
